title: Derived decision index: decisions render -> docs/decisions/index.md (D4b)
action: Per CONTEXT D4b/D6: new `decisions render` verb writes docs/decisions/index.md from the active store (superseded/redacted excluded; archived excluded unless --all): grouped by scope then tag (untagged last), newest-first inside each group, one line per decision `short8 · YYYY-MM-DD · first line of decision text`; supersede events appear under their (inherited) scope. File carries a provenance header naming the generator + timestamp-free determinism note; output is byte-stable for the same store (no wall-clock in the body). Add a --check mode diffing current file vs computed (exit non-zero on drift) for future verify wiring — but do NOT add it to run_verify in this cell. Mirror to .bee/bin, extend tests (grouping, determinism byte-stability across two renders, supersede placement, empty store), render + manifest.

truths: two consecutive renders over the same store are byte-identical
superseded decisions never appear in the index
prohibitions: index.md is never hand-edited source — regenerated only
No wall-clock timestamps in the rendered body
